methods.description: Surface soil samples were collected using the multiple subsampling technique to cover the altitudinal vegetation gradient from the Puna to the High Andean belt.

steps.description: Surface soil samples were collected with the multiple subsampling technique.
steps.searchable_summary: collect surface soil samples using multiple subsampling technique

methods.description: A 5 m sediment core was collected from Laguna Blanca using a modified split-spoon sampler to analyze sediment texture and color.

steps.description: A 5 m sediment core (TLB-1) was raised from the center of Laguna Blanca during the winter season in August 2008.
steps.searchable_summary: collect sediment core from Laguna Blanca

steps.description: Sediments were described through texture analysis and the strata color was determined with the Munsell Soil Colour Chart.

methods.description: Pollen samples were processed and analyzed to determine pollen concentration and types using standard techniques for Quaternary sediments.

steps.description: Pollen samples were processed following the standard techniques for Quaternary sediments.
steps.searchable_summary: process pollen samples using standard techniques

steps.description: Pollen counts were performed with a Zeiss ICS KF2 optic microscope at 400x magnification.
Pollen types were determined with the pollen reference collection and pollen atlases.
steps.searchable_summary: identify pollen types using reference collection

methods.description: Radiocarbon dating was performed on samples using AMS and calibrated with the CALPAL online program.

steps.description: Three additional samples were taken for radiocarbon dating by the Accelerator Mass Spectrometry (AMS).
All radiocarbon ages were calibrated using the CALPAL online program and the CalPal2007_HULU calibration curve.

methods.description: An age-depth model was constructed by linear interpolation to analyze sediment core data.

steps.description: An age-depth model was constructed by linear interpolation method.
steps.searchable_summary: construct age-depth model using linear interpolation

methods.description: Pollen data were visualized in percentage pollen diagrams and analyzed using Cluster Analysis.

steps.description: Data are presented in percentage pollen diagrams of surface soil and fossil samples.
Plotting and zonation are based on a Cluster Analysis carried out with Tilia 2.0.2 software.
steps.searchable_summary: perform cluster analysis using Tilia software
